title: Solo.io Gloo Portal API Product
description: An API product exposed through the Gloo developer portal, containing metadata, versioning, visibility settings, and associated usage plans.

id.description: Unique identifier for the API product.

contact.description: Contact information for the API product owner.

license.description: License information for the API product.

usagePlans.description: List of usage plan IDs associated with this API product.

visibility.description: Visibility setting of the API product.
